title: endoflife.output
description: Report containing lifecycle information from endoflife.date.

analyzer.description: Unique identifier for the EndOfLife analyzer.

repository.description: The image repository that was analyzed.

product.description: Product slug used to query endoflife.date.

product_found.description: Whether the product was found on endoflife.date.

matched_cycle.description: Release cycle matching the image tag, or null if no match.

release_date.description: Official release date of the cycle.

eol.description: End-of-life date or status for this cycle.

latest.description: Latest version available in this cycle.

latest_release_date.description: Release date of the latest version in this cycle.

lts.description: Whether this is a Long Term Support cycle.

is_eol.description: Whether the matched cycle has reached end-of-life. Null if no match.

active_cycles_count.description: Number of currently supported release cycles.
